Speaker: Woman (1)
Text: What? I don't think so.

Speaker: Woman (1)
Text: No.

Speaker: Woman (1)
Text: Mister, you better shove it, because I don't know what you're talking about.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: I don't know what the hell you're sayin'!

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: I don't know what in the world.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: They're full of something.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: I don't know what.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: Shut up.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: Goddammit, tell me what my name is.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: No, it is not.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: Now I'm trying to tell you it.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: I did no such a goddamn thing.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: Well, you dirty rotten bastard, I tell you I didn't order anything and you can't tell me my name.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: So hang up and shut up.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: I said hang up and shut up.

Speaker: Man (2)
Text: Oh, shut up.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: What package?

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: No... I didn't get any lambs.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: Alrigh', so you didn't hear that?

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: I don't want no lambs. Because! I don't know what kind of lambs they are.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: And arreos, man.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: Arrios, man.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: Adios to whatever.

Speaker: Woman (3)
Text: I don't care.

Text: Thanks for darling.
